tool.name: CellPose Interactive
tool.description: a generalist algorithm for cellular segmentation and restoration
tool.command:
export HOME=\$PWD/home/ && export CELLPOSE_START_DIR=\$PWD/home/cp_working_dir/ && mkdir -p ./home/cp_working_dir/models/safe && chmod -R 777 ./home && #for $i,$filename in enumerate($infiles): ln -s '$filename' './home/cp_working_dir/${filename.element_identifier}.${filename.ext}' && #end for
/init &&
if [ -n "\$(ls -A ./home/cp_working_dir/models)" ]; then ## remove saved masks and convert the pytorch models rm -rf ./home/cp_working_dir/models/*.npy && for file in ./home/cp_working_dir/models/*; do if [ -f "\$file" ]; then basename=\$(basename "\$file") python3 '$__tool_directory__/pytorch_convert_safetensors.py' --convert pt_safe -i "\$file" -o "./home/cp_working_dir/models/safe/\${basename}.safetensors"; echo "Converted \$file to \${basename}.safetensors"; fi done fi
